caption: A news broadcast from NEWS 18 इंडिया features a sequence of graphics regarding Bihar politics. The screens display portraits of various politicians, including Nitish Kumar, labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", and several ministers listed under "मंत्री". Central to each frame is a photo of a man in a light-colored shirt next to a map of Uttar Pradesh and text reading "2019 लोक सभा कुल सीट 80" and "कांग्रेस 01". A red news ticker at the bottom updates across the frames; it first reads "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने विजय सिन्हा", then transitions to "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने सम्राट चौधरी". The top banners change from "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Small logos for "MAHAMODH" are visible near the bottom right, and the time "10:08 PM" is consistently displayed.
